title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a role-based access control event management system using Softr's AI Co-Builder feature. The video compares Softr with competitors like Lovable and Replit, highlighting workflow automation, database structure generation, and cost efficiency in application development without repeated AI prompts.
